# parent

**Instance Property**

The media group’s parent group.

## Declaration

```swift
unowned(unsafe) var parent: MLMediaGroup? { get }
```

## Accessing the Group Hierarchy

- **childGroups**: A list of child groups contained in the media group.
- **mediaObjects**: A list of media objects in the media group.

items.description: A list of child groups contained in the media group.
